center.h1: Track and monitor all access to network resources and cardholder data

html.left: The Requirement States: Logging mechanisms and the ability to track user activities are critical in preventing, detecting, or minimizing the impact of a data compromise. The presence of logs in all environments allows thorough tracking, alerting, and analysis when something does go wrong. Determining the cause of a compromise is very difficult without system activity logs.

left.h2: 10.2.1: Verify all individual access to cardholder data is logged.

chart.title: Failed User Access
chart.searchTemplate: ssh2 Failed | rex field=_raw "for(?<USER>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by USER

chart.title: Invalid User Listing
chart.searchTemplate: sshd "invalid user" | rex field=_raw "invalid user(?<USER>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by USER

chart.title: User Access
chart.searchTemplate: sshd "session opened for" | rex field="_raw" "user(?<USER>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by USER

left.h2: 10.2.2: Verify actions taken by an individual with root or administrative privileges is logged.

chart.title: Admin actions
chart.searchTemplate: source="/var/log/secure" sudo | rex field=_raw "sudo:(?<SUDO>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by SUDO COMMAND

chart.title: Admin actions by Host
chart.searchTemplate: source="/var/log/secure" sudo | rex field=_raw "sudo:(?<SUDO>\s[a-z.]*\s)" | chart count by host COMMAND

chart.title: Failed Access
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="syslog" ssh Failed | rex field=_raw "User '(?<User>.*)' auth" | stats count by User | sort count desc

table.title: Failed Read
table.searchTemplate: source=/var/log/messages denied read | top path limit=1000 | fields path

table.title: Failed Write
table.searchTemplate: source=/var/log/messages denied write | top path limit=1000 | fields path

table.title: Failed Exec
table.searchTemplate: source=/var/log/messages denied exec | top path limit=1000 | fields path

left.h2: 10.4: Syncronize all Critical System Clocks and Times

table.title: Servers syncd to NTP server 208
table.searchTemplate: ntp | top host limit=0 | fields host

table.title: Servers syncd to NTP server 209
table.searchTemplate: ntp | top host limit=0 | fields host

left.h2: 10.5.5: Verify the use of file-integrity monitoring or change-detection software for logs by examining systems settings and monitored files and results from monitoring activities

table.title: Servers running AIDE
table.searchTemplate: "aide started" | top host limit=0 | fields host

table.title: AIDE Issues by Host
table.searchTemplate: source="/var/log/aide/aide.log" differences | top host | fields host

chart.title: Aide Issues by Host
chart.searchTemplate: differences | top host limit=0 | fields host

html.left: 10.6b: Through observation and interviews, verify that regular log reviews are performed for all system components.

chart.title: Operator Review of ISO App in last 24 hours
chart.searchTemplate: index="_internal" source="/opt/splunk/var/log/splunk/splunkd_access.log" NOT user=- NOT clientip=192.168.34.226 | chart count by user

html.left: 10.7: retain audit trail history for at least one year, with a minimum of three months immediately available for analysis (for example, online, archived, or restorable from back-up).

table.title: Earliest Audit Event
table.searchTemplate: *| stats min(firstTime) as min | convert ctime(min)
